heading: Waiver and termination of prohibitions of this subchapter
label: 7422 Waiver and termination of prohibitions of this subchapter

children.heading: Authority to initially waive section 7424
children.label: a Authority to initially waive section 7424

children.text: notifies the appropriate congressional committees of the intention to exercise such authority; and

children.label: i
children.text: covered United States persons;

children.label: ii
children.text: covered allied persons; and

children.label: iii
children.text: individuals who were covered United States persons or covered allied persons; and

children.label: B
children.text: ensures that no person described in subparagraph (A) will be arrested, detained, prosecuted, or imprisoned by or on behalf of the International Criminal Court.

children.heading: Authority to extend waiver of section 7424
children.label: b Authority to extend waiver of section 7424

children.text: notifies the appropriate congressional committees of the intention to exercise such authority; and

children.label: I
children.text: covered United States persons;

children.label: II
children.text: covered allied persons; and

children.label: III
children.text: individuals who were covered United States persons or covered allied persons; and

children.label: ii
children.text: ensures that no person described in clause (i) will be arrested, detained, prosecuted, or imprisoned by or on behalf of the International Criminal Court; and

children.label: B
children.text: has taken no steps to arrest, detain, prosecute, or imprison any person described in clause (i) of subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Authority to waive sections 7423 and 7425 with respect to an investigation or prosecution of a named individual
children.label: c Authority to waive sections 7423 and 7425 with respect to an investigation or prosecution of a named individual

children.text: notifies the appropriate congressional committees of the intention to exercise such authority; and

children.label: A
children.text: a waiver pursuant to subsection (a) or (b) of the prohibitions and requirements of is in effect;section 7424 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: there is reason to believe that the named individual committed the crime or crimes that are the subject of the International Criminal Court’s investigation or prosecution;

children.label: C
children.text: it is in the national interest of the United States for the International Criminal Court’s investigation or prosecution of the named individual to proceed; and

children.label: i
children.text: Covered United States persons.

children.label: ii
children.text: Covered allied persons.

children.label: iii
children.text: Individuals who were covered United States persons or covered allied persons.

children.heading: Termination of waiver pursuant to subsection (c)
children.label: d Termination of waiver pursuant to subsection (c)
children.text: Any waiver or waivers exercised pursuant to subsection (c) of the prohibitions and requirements of sections 7423 and 7425 of this title shall terminate at any time that a waiver pursuant to subsection (a) or (b) of the prohibitions and requirements of expires and is not extended pursuant to subsection (b).section 7424 of this title

children.heading: Termination of prohibitions of this subchapter
children.label: e Termination of prohibitions of this subchapter
children.text: The prohibitions and requirements of sections 7423, 7424, and 7425 of this title shall cease to apply, and the authority of shall terminate, if the United States becomes a party to the International Criminal Court pursuant to a treaty made under article II, section 2, clause 2 of the Constitution of the United States.section 7427 of this title
